title: Mali
wikitext:
[[Image:Mali.jpg|270px|right]]
Mali was the rapper heard on [[Evangelion-VOX]], the 1997 R&B/hip-hop album. Sometimes mistakenly stated by fans to be a part of [[Loren and Mash]], he is an independent artist. His real name appears to be Andrew Allen, and he also worked with Shiro Sagisu under the name MC Malicious Gravy on a rap version of the Bleach song Number One.<ref>[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=om82ApsXnmI zinnbuster, "The Bizarre Evangelion Hip-Hop/R&B Album" (YouTube)]</ref> He is the performer and lyricist on the rap tracks on VOX:

*Prelude to Battle
*Battling
*Armageddon
*Angel Attack
*Utopia

His YouTube channel is [https://www.youtube.com/@andrewallen6668 @andrewallen6668] where he goes by Malicious.

==References==
{{reflist}}

[[Category:Music]]
html:
Mali was the rapper heard on Evangelion-VOX, the 1997 R&B/hip-hop album. Sometimes mistakenly stated by fans to be a part of Loren and Mash, he is an independent artist. His real name appears to be Andrew Allen, and he also worked with Shiro Sagisu under the name MC Malicious Gravy on a rap version of the Bleach song Number One.[1] He is the performer and lyricist on the rap tracks on VOX:

  • Prelude to Battle
  • Battling
  • Armageddon
  • Angel Attack
  • Utopia

His YouTube channel is @andrewallen6668 where he goes by Malicious.

References[edit]

  1. ↑ zinnbuster, "The Bizarre Evangelion Hip-Hop/R&B Album" (YouTube)
